psalm-51-1.verse: Lord, have mercy on me according to Your lovingkindness. Thank You for Your compassion and unfailing love.
psalm-51-1.prayer: Lord, have mercy on me according to Your lovingkindness. Thank You for Your compassion and unfailing love.

psalm-51-2.verse: Father, cleanse me from sin and wash away anything that separates me from closer fellowship with You.
psalm-51-2.prayer: Father, cleanse me from sin and wash away anything that separates me from closer fellowship with You.

psalm-51-3.verse: Lord, help me honestly recognize my failures and bring them before You with humility and repentance.
psalm-51-3.prayer: Lord, help me honestly recognize my failures and bring them before You with humility and repentance.

psalm-51-4.verse: Father, help me acknowledge when I have sinned against You and trust in Your forgiveness and grace.
psalm-51-4.prayer: Father, help me acknowledge when I have sinned against You and trust in Your forgiveness and grace.

psalm-51-5.verse: Lord, remind me of my need for Your mercy and Your transforming work within my heart.
psalm-51-5.prayer: Lord, remind me of my need for Your mercy and Your transforming work within my heart.

psalm-51-6.verse: Father, You desire truth in my innermost being. Help me live with honesty, integrity, and sincerity before You.
psalm-51-6.prayer: Father, You desire truth in my innermost being. Help me live with honesty, integrity, and sincerity before You.

psalm-51-7.verse: Lord, cleanse my heart and make me spiritually clean. Thank You for the forgiveness found in You.
psalm-51-7.prayer: Lord, cleanse my heart and make me spiritually clean. Thank You for the forgiveness found in You.

psalm-51-8.verse: Father, restore joy to my heart and help me rejoice again in Your grace and salvation.
psalm-51-8.prayer: Father, restore joy to my heart and help me rejoice again in Your grace and salvation.

psalm-51-9.verse: Lord, remove the guilt and shame of past failures and help me walk in the freedom of Your forgiveness.
psalm-51-9.prayer: Lord, remove the guilt and shame of past failures and help me walk in the freedom of Your forgiveness.

psalm-51-10.verse: Father, create in me a clean heart and renew a steadfast spirit within me.
psalm-51-10.prayer: Father, create in me a clean heart and renew a steadfast spirit within me.

psalm-51-11.verse: Lord, help me remain close to You and sensitive to the leading of Your Spirit.
psalm-51-11.prayer: Lord, help me remain close to You and sensitive to the leading of Your Spirit.

psalm-51-12.verse: Father, restore to me the joy of Your salvation and sustain me with a willing and faithful spirit.
psalm-51-12.prayer: Father, restore to me the joy of Your salvation and sustain me with a willing and faithful spirit.

psalm-51-13.verse: Lord, use my testimony of Your grace to encourage others and point them toward You.
psalm-51-13.prayer: Lord, use my testimony of Your grace to encourage others and point them toward You.

psalm-51-14.verse: Father, thank You for Your deliverance and mercy. Let my life proclaim Your righteousness.
psalm-51-14.prayer: Father, thank You for Your deliverance and mercy. Let my life proclaim Your righteousness.

psalm-51-15.verse: Lord, open my lips so that my mouth may declare Your praise and worship.
psalm-51-15.prayer: Lord, open my lips so that my mouth may declare Your praise and worship.

psalm-51-16.verse: Father, remind me that You desire a surrendered heart more than outward religious activity.
psalm-51-16.prayer: Father, remind me that You desire a surrendered heart more than outward religious activity.

psalm-51-17.verse: Lord, give me a humble and contrite spirit that remains dependent upon Your grace.
psalm-51-17.prayer: Lord, give me a humble and contrite spirit that remains dependent upon Your grace.

psalm-51-18.verse: Father, bless and strengthen Your people. Build up and encourage Your church according to Your will.
psalm-51-18.prayer: Father, bless and strengthen Your people. Build up and encourage Your church according to Your will.

psalm-51-19.verse: Lord, let my worship be pleasing to You as it flows from a sincere and devoted heart.
psalm-51-19.prayer: Lord, let my worship be pleasing to You as it flows from a sincere and devoted heart.

psalm-51-closing.verse: Lord, thank You for Your mercy, forgiveness, and unfailing love. Create in me a clean heart and renew a steadfast spirit within me. Help me walk in humility, honesty, and obedience before You. Restore the joy of my salvation and draw me closer to Your presence each day. May my life reflect Your grace, and may my worship come from a heart that is fully surrendered to You.
psalm-51-closing.prayer: Lord, thank You for Your mercy, forgiveness, and unfailing love. Create in me a clean heart and renew a steadfast spirit within me. Help me walk in humility, honesty, and obedience before You. Restore the joy of my salvation and draw me closer to Your presence each day. May my life reflect Your grace, and may my worship come from a heart that is fully surrendered to You.
